configurations.name: Debug app (lanswitch)
comment: Builds via cargo and launches the tray binary under the debugger.
Note: for normal running, prefer the 'tauri:dev' task (Ctrl+Shift+B) —
it sets up the dev environment that the bare binary does not. Use this
config when you want breakpoints in the Rust code. Run the app once via
tauri:dev first so the webview assets are in place.

configurations.name: Debug helper (lanswitch-helper)
comment: The helper needs elevation to actually change IPs, but you can debug its
socket/validation logic without elevation. To exercise privileged apply,
launch it from an elevated terminal instead and attach.
